title: Unlock Free SaaS with Claude Artifacts: Your AI Power-Up! #shorts
summary: Cyril Imhof demonstrates how to use Claude Artifacts, a Claude feature, to create free SaaS-like tools for practical applications in sales and research without additional cost. The video highlights hidden functionalities and productivity hacks available through this Claude capability.
writeup: This short from Cyril Imhof demonstrates using Claude Artifacts to build free, SaaS-like tools without additional cost. It focuses on practical applications in sales and research, surfacing functionalities and productivity hacks within the Claude feature. The takeaway: Artifacts can stand in for paid software for certain workflows.
